channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [NUTRA] Nutraplus India Ltd Promoter Discloses 40.07% Shareholding for F.Y. 2025-2026
item.description:
Nutraplus India Ltd has received an annual disclosure from its promoter, Mr. Mukesh Dhirubhai Niak, on behalf of the promoter & promoter group. The disclosure, made in accordance with Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011, as amended, reveals that as of March 31, 2026, Mr. Niak and his promoter group hold 1,36,58,920 Equity Shares of the company, representing 40.07% of the total shareholding. No encumbrances were made on these shares during the financial year ended March 31, 2026.

  • Nutraplus India Ltd promoter, Mr. Mukesh Dhirubhai Niak, discloses 40.07% shareholding for F.Y. 2025-2026
  • Disclosure made in accordance with Regulation 31(4) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011, as amended
  • 1,36,58,920 Equity Shares held by the promoter and promoter group
  • No encumbrances made on the shares during the financial year ended March 31, 2026
  • Information submitted for the financial year ended 31st March, 2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Nutraplus India Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [MSAFE] Msafe Equipments Ltd Announces Changes in Senior Management Personnel
item.description:
Msafe Equipments Ltd has announced changes in its Senior Management Personnel. Mr. Rajneesh Kumar has been appointed as President – MRO & Ladder Division, designated as ‘Senior Management Personnel’, with effect from 08th April 2026. Ms. Sonam Nair, Vice President-Operations, has tendered her resignation with effect from the close of business hours on April 30, 2026.

  • Mr. Rajneesh Kumar appointed as President – MRO & Ladder Division, designated as ‘Senior Management Personnel’
  • Ms. Sonam Nair, Vice President-Operations, has resigned from her position

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MSAFE | Category: New Launch

item.title: [ISFL] ISF Ltd: No Encumbrances on Shares by Promoter/Promoter Group in FY 2025-26
item.description:
In a declaration under Regulation 31(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, ISF Limited's Promoter and Promoter Group have confirmed that no encumbrances were created on the shares of ISF Limited held by them, directly or indirectly, during the financial year 2025-26. This declaration was made by Vishal Dang, Chief Executive Officer of ISF Limited, and was sent to the Audit Committee and Regd. Office of ISF Limited.

  • ISF Limited's Promoter and Promoter Group made no encumbrances on the company's shares during the financial year 2025-26.
  • The declaration was made in accordance with Regulation 31(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
  • Vishal Dang, Chief Executive Officer of ISF Limited, signed the declaration on behalf of the Promoter and Promoter Group.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ISF LIMITED | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ADORMUL] Acquirer Withdraws Disclosure for Voluntary 3.14% Share Acquisition in Thrive Future Habitats Ltd
item.description:
Arvinder Singh Pasricha, the acquirer, has withdrawn his disclosure under Regulation 10(5) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares and Takeovers) Regulations, 2011. The acquisition of 3,00,000 equity shares from Mrs. Aman Pasricha Balsara represents 3.14% of Thrive Future Habitats Ltd's share capital. This acquisition is independent of the open offer made during the financial year 2025-26 and is within the permissible limit of 5% under Regulation 3(2) of the SAST Regulations. Both the acquirer and the seller have complied with the disclosure requirements under Regulation 29(2) of the SAST Regulations.

  • Arvinder Singh Pasricha voluntarily withdraws disclosure for 3.14% share acquisition in Thrive Future Habitats Ltd.
  • The acquisition is independent of the open offer made during the financial year 2025-26.
  • The acquisition is within the permissible limit of 5% under Regulation 3(2) of the SAST Regulations.
  • Both the acquirer and the seller have complied with the disclosure requirements under Regulation 29(2) of the SAST Regulations.
  • No further open offer obligation is triggered due to this acquisition.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ADOR MULTIPRODUCTS LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [COLPAL] Colgate Makes Preventive Dental Care Accessible to All with FREE Dental Check-Ups
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Colgate-Palmolive (India) Limited is strengthening its Oral Health Movement to make preventive dental care more accessible by offering free dental check-ups. The initiative, in partnership with the Indian Dental Association (IDA), has onboarded 63,000 Dentists and integrated a Virtual Consultation option to ensure physical distance does not become a barrier for people to access the dentist. The aim is to make dental professionals more accessible while driving a long-term shift toward early diagnosis and better Oral Health for all.

  • Colgate-Palmolive (India) Limited is making preventive dental care more accessible with free dental check-ups
  • The initiative is in partnership with the Indian Dental Association (IDA) and has onboarded 63,000 Dentists
  • A Virtual Consultation option is integrated to ensure physical distance does not hinder dental consultation
  • The aim is to bridge the gap in dentist visits, with only 9% of Indians visiting a dentist annually
  • Colgate continues to work closely with the dental community to champion preventive care

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: COLGATE-PALMOLIVE (INDIA) LTD. | Category: Preventive Dental Care

item.title: [RAINBOW] Rainbow Children's Medicare Ltd: No Undisclosed Material Information Behind Securities Volume Movement
item.description:
Rainbow Children's Medicare Ltd has submitted a clarification regarding the significant movement in the volume of its securities. The company confirmed that it is in compliance with the SEBI regulations and there is no undisclosed material information or unpublished price sensitive information that has not been disclosed to the stock exchanges. The movement in the volume of securities is attributed to market conditions and investor sentiment.

  • Rainbow Children's Medicare Ltd is in compliance with the SEBI regulations
  • No undisclosed material information or unpublished price sensitive information
  • The movement in the volume of securities is attributed to market conditions and investor sentiment
  • The company is committed to ensuring timely, adequate and accurate disclosures
  • Rainbow Children's Medicare Ltd reiterates its commitment to regulatory disclosure requirements

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rainbow Children's Medicare Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [DHRUVCA] Dhruva Capital Services Ltd Cancels Scheme of Amalgamation with Vector Finance Private Limited
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Dhruva Capital Services Ltd has announced the cancellation of the Scheme of Amalgamation and Arrangement between Vector Finance Private Limited and Dhruva Capital Services Limited. The decision was made due to pending approval from the BSE and a change in the valuation of the company since the relevant date of the Scheme. The amalgamation process will not be proceeded with further.

  • Dhruva Capital Services Ltd cancels Scheme of Amalgamation with Vector Finance Private Limited
  • Cancellation due to pending BSE approval and change in company valuation
  • Amalgamation process will not be proceeded with further

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DHRUVA CAPITAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [VALPLAST] Valplast Technologies Limited: No Encumbrance on Shares by Promoters for FY 2025-2026
item.description:
In compliance with the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011, Valplast Technologies Limited has disclosed that the promoters, promoter group, and persons acting in concert have not made any encumbrance on the shares held by them in the company during the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The details are attached as Annexure-I.

  • Valplast Technologies Limited has complied with Regulation 31(4) of the SEBI (Substantial Acquisition of Shares & Takeovers) Regulations, 2011.
  • Promoters, promoter group, and persons acting in concert have not made any encumbrance on the shares held in the company during the financial year ended March 31, 2026.
  • The details are provided in Annexure-I.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Valplast Technologies Ltd | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [MAXHEALTH] Max Healthcare Re-appoints Mr. Narayan K. Seshadri as Non-Executive and Non-Independent Director, Acquires Controlling Stake in Kalinga Hospital Ltd.
item.description:
Max Healthcare Institute Ltd. has announced the re-appointment of Mr. Narayan K. Seshadri as Non-Executive and Non-Independent Director for a further term of 3 years, effective from May 16, 2026 to May 15, 2029. The board also approved the acquisition of a controlling stake (~58.39%) in Kalinga Hospital Ltd., which operates a 250-bedded Multi-Specialty Hospital in Bhubaneswar, Orissa. The company will provide loans up to ₹100 Crore to KHL towards cost of construction, renovation, upgradation, equipment etc. and issue a Corporate Guarantee to Bank/ Financial Institution for re-financing of External Commercial Borrowings of existing promoter of KHL of $5 Mn. The Senior Secured Term Loan of amount up to ₹300 Crore in the form of External Commercial Borrowings has been approved for financing the acquisition.

  • Re-appointment of Mr. Narayan K. Seshadri as Non-Executive and Non-Independent Director for a further term of 3 years.
  • Acquisition of controlling stake (~58.39%) in Kalinga Hospital Ltd.
  • Loans up to ₹100 Crore to KHL towards cost of construction, renovation, upgradation, equipment etc.
  • Issuance of Corporate Guarantee to Bank/ Financial Institution for re-financing of External Commercial Borrowings of existing promoter of KHL of $5 Mn.
  • Approval of Senior Secured Term Loan of amount up to ₹300 Crore in the form of External Commercial Borrowings for financing the acquisition.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Max Healthcare Institute Ltd | Category: Acquisitions

item.title: [MAXHEALTH] Max Healthcare to Acquire Controlling Stake in 250-bed Kalinga Hospital for ₹100 Crore
item.description:
Max Healthcare Institute Ltd has announced its decision to acquire a controlling stake (~58.39%) in Kalinga Hospital Ltd (KHL), which operates a 250-bedded Multi-Specialty Hospital in Bhubaneswar, Orissa. The acquisition will be made through a share purchase agreement (SPA) and is expected to cost ₹100 Crore towards cost of construction, renovation, upgradation, equipment etc. The Board has also approved issuance of Corporate Guarantee to Bank/ Financial Institution for re-financing of External Commercial Borrowings of existing promoter of KHL of $5 Mn (along with interest due thereon). In addition, the Board has approved a Senior Secured Term Loan of amount up to ₹300 Crore in the form of External Commercial Borrowings for financing the acquisition. The Board has also approved the re-appointment of Mr. Narayan K. Seshadri as Non-Executive and Non-Independent Director for a further period of 3 years.

  • Max Healthcare to acquire controlling stake in 250-bed Kalinga Hospital for ₹100 Crore
  • Acquisition to be made through a share purchase agreement (SPA)
  • Board approved a Senior Secured Term Loan of amount up to ₹300 Crore for financing the acquisition
  • Board also approved issuance of Corporate Guarantee to Bank/ Financial Institution for re-financing of External Commercial Borrowings of existing promoter of KHL of $5 Mn
  • Mr. Narayan K. Seshadri re-appointed as Non-Executive and Non-Independent Director for a further period of 3 years

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Max Healthcare Institute Ltd | Category: Acquisitions
